mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over a 3-year rolling window or forward returns are negative in >55% of rate-cut months.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 5.0 percent, labor market slack triggers recession fears that force equity risk premiums higher, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in >60% of months where UNRATE exceeds 5.0 percent, or signal loses statistical significance at p<0.05.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real GDP and retail sales confirms broad-based consumer demand strength, driving corporate earnings revisions upward and generating positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in GDPC1 and RSAFS fails to produce positive 60-day returns in >50% of cases, or interaction term coefficient is statistically insignificant.

mechanism_narrative: During late-cycle expansions, industrial production growth above trend signals capacity constraints that force the Federal Reserve to tighten policy, triggering negative short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: INDPRO outperformance does not precede negative 5-day returns during late-cycle phases, or regime classification yields no predictive power over baseline.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate falls below 1.0 percent, liquidity injections and yield curve steepening compress valuation multiples, forcing S&P 500 prices higher over the following month.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns are negative in >55% of observations where FEDFUNDS drops below 1.0 percent, or out-of-sample Sharpe ratio remains below 0.5.

mechanism_narrative: Rising total employment combined with a falling unemployment rate confirms a tightening labor market that boosts wage growth and consumer spending, generating positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict positive 60-day returns in >50% of triggered months, or the interaction effect vanishes in multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: Higher housing starts indicate strong residential investment and construction sector activity, which immediately lifts market sentiment and produces positive S&P 500 returns over the next week.
failure_condition: HOUST increases fail to precede positive 5-day returns in >60% of cases, or the signal exhibits negative rank correlation over rolling 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: In post-shock recovery regimes, industrial production levels above the 2017 baseline confirm supply chain normalization, reducing uncertainty premiums and driving positive monthly equity returns.
failure_condition: INDPRO values above 100 do not generate positive 20-day returns during recovery phases, or the regime-specific alpha decays to zero within 12 months.
